title: Test Oban peer leader failover without real queues
prompt: Write `docs/oban_peer_leader_sandbox.md` explaining how to test Oban plugins that depend on peer leader election (like `Oban.Plugins.Cron`) WITHOUT running real queues in sandbox tests. Must explain: (1) Oban.Plugins.Cron schedules jobs based on peer leader election, (2) in `testing: :manual` mode, plugins are NOT run — peer leader election does not happen, (3) to test cron jobs, instantiate the plugin state directly via `Oban.Plugins.Cron.handle_info/2` with a mock leader state, (4) or use `with_testing_mode(:inline, fn -> ... end)` briefly to exercise the plugin, (5) never attempt to wait for a real peer leader in a sandbox test.
